$comment: Phase 4 Slice C — Vercel Cron binding for the notification dispatcher. Copy this to vercel.json to enable it. A sub-daily schedule (below runs every 2 minutes) requires a Vercel PRO plan; Hobby caps cron at once per day, so on Hobby use an external scheduler instead (see docs/dispatcher-ops.md). Also set the CRON_SECRET env var in the Vercel project — Vercel then sends `Authorization: Bearer $CRON_SECRET`, which the dispatch route accepts.
